message:
fix(runtime): remove duplicate CountingWriter, fix inline height clipping

- Remove local CountingWriter struct in favor of ftui_render's
  CountingWriter (already wrapped inside Presenter)
- Adapt callsites: enable_counting→reset_counter, take_count→bytes_written
- Fix borrow checker issues with direct field access for presenter
- Fix inline mode height clipping: use visible_height in BufferDiff::full
  instead of buffer.height(), preventing cursor overflow past terminal bounds
- Remove 6 now-redundant CountingWriter unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
